name: UWC South East Asia (East)
tagline: World-class IB education in Singapore's eastern region
description: The UWCSEA East Campus, opened in 2008, brings the UWC mission to eastern Singapore. With state-of-the-art facilities purpose-built for the 21st century, the East Campus serves students from Kindergarten 1 through Grade 12. Like its sister campus, UWCSEA East offers the full IB continuum combined with UWCSEA's own concept-based curriculum. The campus features a 50-meter Olympic pool, dedicated performing arts spaces, and generous sports fields on a modern, sustainably designed campus in Tampines.

admission.process: Same holistic admissions process as Dover Campus. Applications are evaluated by a committee considering school reports, student statements, references, and assessment performance.
admission.deadlines: Main intake in August; limited January intake available. Applications open one year prior.
admission.assessmentInfo: Entrance assessments in English and Mathematics plus an interview. Boarding is not available at the East Campus.

faqs.question: How does UWCSEA East differ from Dover?
faqs.answer: Both campuses share the same curriculum, mission, and admissions standards. The East Campus is newer (opened 2008), located in Tampines, and does not offer boarding. The Dover Campus has a longer history and boarding from Grade 8.

faqs.question: Is there boarding at UWCSEA East?
faqs.answer: No, boarding is only available at the Dover Campus. East Campus is a day school serving families in the eastern and north-eastern parts of Singapore.

faqs.question: What are the fees at UWCSEA East?
faqs.answer: Fees are identical to the Dover Campus: approximately SGD 34,000 to SGD 48,000 per year depending on grade level (2025/2026).

faqs.question: How do I apply to UWCSEA East?
faqs.answer: Applications are submitted through the unified UWCSEA admissions portal. You can express a campus preference, and the admissions team will guide you through the process.

seo.title: UWCSEA East Campus — Fees, Curriculum & Admission | EduAtlas
seo.description: UWC South East Asia East Campus in Tampines: IB World School for ages 4-18. View fees, curriculum, admission process and facilities at Singapore's newest UWC campus.
